title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Disha Publication

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Disha Publication
jsonLd.description:
Disha Publication invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Teacher at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Disha Publication:
Disha Publication is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Disha Publication!
